generatedPost:
BWS | Coding

This week we deployed 76 updates to X Bot in production, delivering major improvements to crypto purchase flows, MetaMask wallet integration, chat-specific filtering systems, and comprehensive platform documentation.

[X Bot]
• Admin private notification system for credit exhaustion alerts
• MetaMask transaction cancellation immediate error feedback
• DM purchase privacy - ETH payment messages route to private chat
• ETH payment confirmation visibility maintained until blockchain confirms
• Browser paint delay before MetaMask popup for status message display
• Chat-specific tag leaderboard filtering with dual-record system
• Global leaderboard filtering to show only CHAT_ID=GLOBAL records
• Cashtag validation with enforced AND logic in post-processing
• AWS SDK v3 compatibility using JavaScript Set implementation
• DynamoDB StringSet implementation for CHAT_IDS to fix ADD operator
• Post score calculation with base 10 points in website display
• Chat-specific filtering with chatId prefix stripping for USERNAME queries
• IAM policy simplification to resolve 2048 byte size limit
• CodePipeline and CodeBuild read permissions for Claude Code
• Sort options info icon on posts page with cache-busting
• Comprehensive documentation published to docs.bws.ninja

X Bot is a Telegram-based analytics platform providing accurate X (Twitter) engagement metrics using the official X API, helping crypto projects measure community impact and KOL profitability, enabling KOL teams to showcase verifiable performance, and allowing investors to discover projects with authentic community traction.

📚 https://docs.bws.ninja/telegram-bots/x-bot

$BWS #Web3 #Blockchain #BWS
